title: solanum galactites
intro: Solanum galactites, also known as sticky nightshade or milk thistle nightshade, is a species of flowering plant in the family Solanaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Solanum galactites are attributed to its ability to aid digestion, reduce fever, and treat various skin conditions. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, with the latter often used topically for skin issues and the former consumed to support overall well-being.
